operator_instances.transformation_goal: Increase data complexity by enlarging the metabolic model and using floating-point stoichiometric coefficients.
operator_instances.rationale: Tests if the function can handle larger models (more reactions and compounds) and non-integer coefficients without error.

semantic_test_specs.semantic_intent: Prove that the function correctly constructs variable namespaces and constraints when the model size is increased and stoichiometric coefficients are floats.
semantic_test_specs.target_constraint: The function must handle larger reaction/compound sets and non-integer coefficients without error.
semantic_test_specs.expected_failure_mode: Naive solutions that assume fixed number of reactions or use integer-only arithmetic may fail on floating-point coefficients or miss reactions.
semantic_test_specs.test_case_description: Run make_tmfa_problem with the enlarged model and verify correct variable definitions and constraints.

output_requirements: Scaled executable cases must expose the behavior with larger model and floating-point coefficients.

operator_instances.transformation_goal: Ensure the function correctly handles floating-point bounds from the model without assuming integer types.
operator_instances.rationale: Adds computational complexity by introducing non-integer bounds, requiring the function to pass them correctly to variable definitions.

semantic_test_specs.semantic_intent: Prove that the function correctly passes floating-point bounds to the variable definition without rounding or truncation.
semantic_test_specs.target_constraint: The variable bounds in the output must match the model limits exactly (as floats).
semantic_test_specs.expected_failure_mode: If the function converts bounds to integers (e.g., via int()) or ignores fractional parts, the output will show integer bounds.
semantic_test_specs.test_case_description: Run make_tmfa_problem with model that has floating-point bounds and verify flux variable bounds match.

output_requirements: Scaled executable cases must capture the floating-point bounds in the output.

operator_instances.transformation_goal: Introduce adversarial robustness by including reaction or compound names with special characters (spaces, parentheses) that test string handling.
operator_instances.rationale: Prevents solutions that assume simple alphanumeric keys; ensures use of convert_to_unicode or proper string conversion.

semantic_test_specs.semantic_intent: Prove that the function handles reaction and compound names containing spaces, parentheses, and underscores without errors.
semantic_test_specs.target_constraint: All variable namespace keys must exactly match the original strings (including special characters).
semantic_test_specs.expected_failure_mode: Solutions that strip whitespace, split on spaces, or only handle letters may produce incorrect keys or missing variables.
semantic_test_specs.test_case_description: Run make_tmfa_problem with model that has reaction names containing space and underscore, verify keys preserved.

output_requirements: Scaled executable cases must verify the exact keys in variable dictionaries.

operator_instances.transformation_goal: Add verifier checks on the number of mass balance constraints and that each namespace has the expected set of keys.
operator_instances.rationale: Ensures the verification catches missing constraints or extra variables that are not part of the TMFA structure.

new_checks: count_constraints: must equal number of compounds
check_keys_in_namespace: v must have keys for all reactions
check_keys_in_namespace: zi must have keys for all reactions
check_keys_in_namespace: dgri must have keys for all reactions
check_keys_in_namespace: xij must have keys for all compounds

object_state_tests.description: Check that number of constraints equals number of compounds

new_checks: count_constraints: must equal number of compounds
check_keys_in_namespace: v must have keys for all reactions
check_keys_in_namespace: zi must have keys for all reactions
check_keys_in_namespace: dgri must have keys for all reactions
check_keys_in_namespace: xij must have keys for all compounds

object_state_tests.description: Check that number of constraints equals number of compounds

semantic_test_specs.semantic_intent: Prove that the constructed LP problem has the correct structure: four namespaces with expected keys and one constraint per compound.
semantic_test_specs.target_constraint: The verification must enforce that the problem has exactly the right number of constraints and variable keys.
semantic_test_specs.expected_failure_mode: Solutions that miss creating a namespace or omit certain variables will fail these checks.
semantic_test_specs.test_case_description: After calling make_tmfa_problem, verify that prob.namespaces contains all four namespaces and prob.constraints length matches compound count.

output_requirements: Scaled executable cases must include object state assertions alongside stdout checks.
